title: galium sylvestre var. atlanticum
intro: Galium sylvestre var. atlanticum, also known as Atlantic bedstraw, is a variant of the Galium sylvestre plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Atlantic bedstraw include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve kidney function, and support the immune system. Atlantic bedstraw can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
